---
name: Service submission
about: Request to add a service to the Wayforth catalog
title: '[SERVICE] '
labels: service-request
---

**Service name**

**Endpoint URL**

**Category** (inference / data / translation / image / code / audio / embeddings)

**Description** (1-2 sentences, what does this service do for agents?)

**Pricing** (USDC per request, or free)

**Payment protocol** (wayforth / x402)

Note: You can also submit directly at https://wayforth.io/submit
